comment: PROJ1-DYN3-CONT8 / M2-ε scenario manifest. v2 (CONT9 add) appends 6 convergence-focused + mode-comparison scenarios after the original 4. Order here is presentation order in UI. Each entry maps id -> filename (relative to this directory). New scenarios designed against verified seller/buyer math (marginPrice ₹350, minAcceptable ₹355, targetPrice ₹385, rule-fallback thresholds R1≥380 R2≥370 R3≥360 R3-sanity ≤lastBuyer+30, buyer random opening ₹250–₹320, concession 0.4/0.4/0.6).
